members.name: cameraTransform
members.description: Gets the loaded camera transform matrix for the configuration. This should be referenced in the 'Xform Matrix/CHOP/DAT' parameter of the Camera COMP.

members.name: projection
members.description: Gets the loaded projection matrix for the configuration. This should be referenced in the 'Proj Matrix/CHOP/DAT' parameter of the Camera COMP, with the 'Projection' set to 'Custom Projection Matrix'.

members.name: calibWidth
members.description: Gets the calibration width as defined by calibration file.

members.name: calibHeight
members.description: Gets the calibration height as defined by calibration file.

members.name: calibApproxWidth
members.description: Gets the calibration approximate width as defined by calibration file.

members.name: calibApproxHeight
members.description: Gets the calibration approximate height as defined by calibration file.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ScalabledisplayTOP Class wiki page
